ques: Find a Mexico hotel with deals for December 25-26, 2026.
answer: Searched Booking.com for Mexico, Dec 25–26 2026. Found many hotels with deals — e.g. Hacienda Sepulveda Hotel & Spa (9.5 Exceptional, from $248), Hotel El Dorado (9.0, from $56), and Hotel Plaza Cuatro Ciénegas (9.2, from $143).
